title: Senior Doctor - Baxter India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Baxter India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Baxter India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Baxter India:
Baxter India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baxter India!
